title: Chikoo - Bunty In The Haunted House
subTitle: A group of friends plan a weekend getaway to a resort. However, when they arrive, their destination appears to be an abandoned house where the visitors begin to mysteriously disappear.

title: Motu Patlu & Mission Kung Fu Kid
subTitle: While Akuma holds Vikram Pratap captive in order to become the king, Motu and Patlu are assigned with the operation to ruin his plans.

title: Motu Patlu Kung Fu Kings 4: The Challenge Of Kung Fu Brothers
subTitle: Eager to defeat two nefarious brothers, Motu and Patlu devote their time to training their minds and bodies with the help of various friends and allies.

title: Chikoo - Bunty In The Ultimate Dream Chase
subTitle: Chikoo and Bunty face a dilemma when the Cricket World Cup is scheduled on the same day as Bunty's birthday, causing them to get into an argument to decide which event must be given priority.
